mapper.sql: tt.employee_id, tt.title, tt.content, tt.teach_experience, tt.other_experience_compose, tt.my_experience_compose, tt.ever_experience, tt.be_good_at, tt.level, tt.score, tt.pass_date, tt.attribute1, tt.attribute2, tt.attribute5, tt.attribute4, tt.id, tt.attribute3, tt.create_time, tt.create_by, tt.update_time, tt.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.title as ${tAlias}_title, ${tAlias}.content as ${tAlias}_content, ${tAlias}.teach_experience as ${tAlias}_teach_experience, ${tAlias}.other_experience_compose as ${tAlias}_other_experience_compose, ${tAlias}.my_experience_compose as ${tAlias}_my_experience_compose, ${tAlias}.ever_experience as ${tAlias}_ever_experience, ${tAlias}.be_good_at as ${tAlias}_be_good_at, ${tAlias}.level as ${tAlias}_level, ${tAlias}.score as ${tAlias}_score, ${tAlias}.pass_date as ${tAlias}_pass_date, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team,
, (select top 1 pe_pee.education from pm_employee_education pe_pee where pe.id = pe_pee.employee_id and pe_pee.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pee.new_education_flag = 1 ) as pe_pee_education, (select top 1 pe_peen.entry_time from pm_employee_entry pe_peen where pe.id = pe_peen.employee_id and pe_peen.enabled_flag = 1) as pe_peen_entry_time,
from td_teacher tt join pm_employee pe on tt.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1
left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pe_pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 left outer join fnd_job pe_pej_fj on pe_pej.job_id = pe_pej_fj.id and pe_pej_fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pe_pej_fj.deleted_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_teacher (employee_id, title, content, teach_experience, other_experience_compose, my_experience_compose, ever_experience, be_good_at, level, score, pass_date, attribute1, attribute2, attribute5, attribute4, attribute3, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teachExperience,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{myExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{everExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beGoodAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{passDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_teacher set employee_id = #{pmEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teach_experience = #{teachExperience,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_experience_compose = #{otherExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, my_experience_compose = #{myExperienceCompose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ever_experience = #{everExperience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, be_good_at = #{beGoodAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, score = #{score,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pass_date = #{passDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select pe.id as employee_id, pe.name as name from td_teacher tt join pm_employee pe on tt.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0
and ( pe.name like #{criteria.nameAndWork, jdbcType = VARCHAR} or pe.work_card like #{criteria.nameAndWork, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
